iti50:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti50:2.1: “Monks, there are these three roots of what is unskillful.
iti50:2.3:
Greed as a root of what is unskillful, aversion as a root of what is unskillful,
delusion as a root of what is unskillful.
iti50:2.4: These are the three roots of what is unskillful.”
iti50:3.2: the self-same person of evil mind
iti50:3.4: like the fruiting of the bamboo.
